name: Bouncing On It For Silksong
description:
Gyaru Queenbee Char x Nerd User

Reina is in dire need for some money for... a hobby of hers. What hobby? Not important. At least she wouldn't tell you. All you need to know is that she is paying a fine price. Just say yes to that once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Or try to bargain and see how far you can get her...

Avatar Picture

(Where I got the idea from)

This is just a silly smaller bot I wanted to quickly make. That's all.
creator: Endivick
